rules.fresh: Today's canonical Notion source was checked or updated.
rules.pending: Captured in chat or draft artifact but not yet committed to Notion.
rules.stale: Data is older than the freshness window or contradicted by a newer source.
rules.missing: Source was not checked or no source is available.
